signals.headline: Solana Alpenglow Upgrade Passes Governance Vote with 98
signals.raw:
Solana Alpenglow Upgrade Passes Governance Vote with 98.27% Approval | YES | HIGH confidence**  
The Alpenglow upgrade, aimed at reducing Solana transaction finality to 100-150 milliseconds, was confirmed via a governance vote securing 98.27% in favor, positioning Solana as a top high-speed layer amid strong network activity like $57B DEX volume in March.[3]

signals.headline: Bank of Korea Raises 2026 Inflation Outlook Amid Oil Price Surge | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
Bank of Korea Raises 2026 Inflation Outlook Amid Oil Price Surge | YES | HIGH confidence**

The Bank of Korea has just confirmed an upward revision to its inflation forecast for 2026, raising the outlook to **2.2% from the earlier projection of 2.1%**, driven by escalating Middle East tensions and surging oil prices above $100 per barrel[2][3].
